channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Oprah Winfrey's 1971 Miss Fire Prevention Win in Nashville Launched Her Broadcasting Career
item.description: In 1971, a 17-year-old Oprah Winfrey won the Miss Fire Prevention contest in Nashville, Tennessee. As the only Black participant, she stood out not through traditional beauty standards but through her...

item.title: Tanzania pushes for UN Security Council reforms to include Africa and developing nations
item.description: Tanzania is strongly pushing for reforms at the United Nations Security Council because the current system no longer mirrors the political and demographic realities of today. During the Foreign Minist...

item.title: Philippine workers rank second in workplace happiness in Asia-Pacific
item.description: A recent study by Jobstreet by SEEK, called the Workplace Happiness Index: Philippines 2025, has shown that Filipino employees are among the happiest workers in the Asia-Pacific region, ranking second...

item.title: Sher Afzal Marwat petitions FCC to reinstate Ali Amin Gandapur as KP Chief Minister
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Sher Afzal Khan Marwat, MNA and former PTI member, has approached the Federal Constitutional Court seeking reinstatement of Ali Amin Gandapur as Chief Minister of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. Marwat...

item.title: Highlights of Vivid Sydney 2026 Light Festival
item.description: Vivid Sydney 2026 is transforming the city into a spectacular playground of light, art, and culture. The festival features an impressive 6.5-kilometre light walk stretching from Barangaroo to Darling ...

item.title: Florentino’s revamped menu continues Melbourne’s love for classic Italian dining
item.description: Florentino, one of Melbourne’s most iconic Italian restaurants, has recently undergone a change of ownership, sparking curiosity and anticipation across the city’s dining scene. Known for its longstan...

item.title: Hayley Williams reflects on her first solo tour and returning to normal life
item.description: Hayley Williams, the frontwoman of Paramore, has shared her thoughts on completing the North American leg of her first solo tour in support of her 2025 album ‘Ego Death At A Bachelorette Party’. In a ...

item.title: Coast musician charged with multiple offences involving minors in Mombasa and Kilifi
item.description: Rama Almasi Amos, popularly known as Mjanja Almasi, a musician based along the Kenyan coast, has been charged with a total of 63 counts including defilement, child trafficking, child abuse, and operat...

item.title: Mphasis AI and Robotics Lab to Open at Sahyadri Engineering College with State Minister Inauguration
item.description: On 22nd May 2026, Higher Education Minister M. C. Sudhakar is set to inaugurate the newly established Mphasis AI and Robotics Laboratory at Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management in Mangaluru....

item.title: Joan Collins: Vintage Portraits of the Legendary Actress and Dynasty Star
item.description: Joan Collins, the renowned English actress, author, and columnist, has enjoyed a career spanning over seven decades in the entertainment industry. She first gained prominence during Hollywood's Golden...

item.title: Johannesburg water system under pressure from infrastructure issues and criminal attacks
item.description: The City of Johannesburg is facing significant challenges in supplying water to its residents, largely due to ageing infrastructure, criminal activity targeting water facilities, and rising costs of w...

item.title: Pistachio Mint Pesto Recipe: A Fresh Spring Blend for Meals
item.description: In this spring edition of Cooking Together, a delightful pistachio mint pesto recipe is shared that brings vibrant flavours to the table. The recipe combines fresh ingredients for a textured sauce per...

item.title: Governance Failures at ANU Highlight Need for Democratic Reform
item.description: Christian Flynn, a former student-elected member of the Australian National University (ANU) council, reflects on the governance crisis that has seen six of 15 council members resign. He attributes th...

item.title: The SS Matsonia: Celebrated Luxury Ocean Liner of the 1950s
item.description: The SS Matsonia, relaunched in 1957 and prominent by 1959, epitomized luxury travel between California and Hawaii during the post-war era. Originally built in 1932 as the SS Monterey, the ship underwe...

item.title: Rio Ferdinand Announces Separation from Wife Kate Ferdinand
item.description: Former Manchester United and England defender Rio Ferdinand has announced his separation from his wife Kate Ferdinand after nearly six years of marriage. The couple, who tied the knot in a big ceremon...

item.title: India's power demand reaches all-time high of 270.8 GW on Thursday due to severe heatwave
item.description: India's peak power demand has touched a new record high for the fourth day in a row as a strong heatwave continues to grip several parts of the country. According to the Ministry of Power, the demand ...

item.title: Trump’s Victory Arch in Washington, D.C. Receives Conditional Approval from Federal Commission
item.description: President Donald Trump received partial approval for his proposed 'victory arch' near the Lincoln Memorial in Washington, D.C., as the U.S. Commission of Fine Arts, largely composed of his appointees,...

item.title: Benjamin Mkapa Hospital launches Sh7 billion campaign for kidney and bone marrow transplants
item.description: Benjamin Mkapa Hospital (BMH) in Dodoma has started a Sh7 billion fundraising drive to support 100 underprivileged patients over the next two years, focusing on kidney and bone marrow transplants. Thi...

item.title: IU and Byeon Woo Seok Star in 'Perfect Crown,' a Drama Worth Watching on Disney Plus
item.description: IU and Byeon Woo Seok's latest K-Drama 'Perfect Crown' has captured the attention of viewers on Disney Plus despite some surrounding controversies. The show brings together two highly popular actors w...

item.title: Dr Jamilu Gwamna Elected APC Governorship Candidate for Gombe 2027
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don officially declare Dr Jamilu Ishiaku Gwamna as their governorship candidate for the 2027 general election for Gombe State. The announcement follow the state-wid...
